description: Style Note Carry style wherever you go with this classic green handbag from baggit. Look your best while adding this fashionable bag to your apparel when you strut down the streets. Let this fella' accompany you to that oh so special event that requires you to look brilliant at and it will give you that extra subtle something.Product Details Green handbag with an adjustable synthetic leather strapHas one main large internal compartment and one small internal compartmentHas two external compartments plus small pouch in front with logo on itGreen drawstring style ribbon to tighten the bag with metal zippers, elastic pouches on the sidesMaterial and Care Synthetic,fabric Use cloth to remove dust and dirtSize Height: 27.5 cm Width: 25.5 cm Depth: 12 cm
